name: Nice Shot Golf Lounge & Bar
address: 10050 S Eastern Ave Suite 120, Henderson, NV 89052
about: Nice Shot Golf Lounge & Bar is a premier indoor golf destination offering a unique blend of cutting-edge golf simulators and a sophisticated bar experience. The venue provides guests with the opportunity to immerse themselves in a round of virtual golf while enjoying an exceptional selection of rare bourbons and other top-shelf spirits. Amenities include AI swing analysis to enhance the practice and playing experience for golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to cutting-edge golf simulators for realistic play
Sophisticated bar experience with premium spirits
AI swing analysis for skill improvement

food_and_drink.notes: Exceptional selection of rare bourbons and other top-shelf spirits

faq.answer: The website does not specify, so it's recommended to contact the venue directly.

faq.answer: No, the venue offers its own selection of drinks, including rare bourbons and top-shelf spirits.

faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for an 18-hole round.
